title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'architecture_oversight' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'architecture_oversight' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Spoke/advisors/architecture_oversight/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/architecture_oversight/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load architecture_oversight's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform architecture_oversight's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Spoke/advisors/architecture_oversight/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
5. Set last_run_at=2026-06-15T11:40:04.025581Z in WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json (entry advisor_id=architecture_oversight) AND WAI-Spoke/advisors/architecture_oversight/scan_state.json.
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Spoke/advisors/architecture_oversight/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'architecture_oversight'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.
